summary: Tested all 7 requested features. All features pass with one bug fixed in backend (missing horario_termino and crea_final in InspectionUpdate model).

minor.issue: Missing horario_termino and crea_final fields in InspectionUpdate model

passed_tests: TEST 1 PASS: Página Identificação has 'Página Inicial' button (not 'Voltar') that opens modal with 'Cancelar' and 'Sim' buttons
TEST 2 PASS: Página Identificação does NOT have 'Horário de Término' field (removed as per requirements)
TEST 3 PASS: Página Finalização has all fields: Responsável Técnico, CREA, Data, Horário de Início (readonly), Horário de Término (editable)
TEST 4 PASS: Página após Finalizar shows Informações section with: Cliente, Endereço, Unidade/Apartamento, Empreendimento, Construtora, Tipo do Imóvel, Energia Disponível, Documentos Recebidos
TEST 5 PASS: Página após Finalizar has both 'Editar Vistoria' and 'Editar Informações' buttons when inspection is completed
TEST 6 PASS: 'Editar Informações' button navigates to /edit page (identification page)
TEST 7 PASS: Checklist validation prevents navigation without filling all Existência and Condição fields, shows error toast with pending items
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added horario_termino and crea_final to InspectionUpdate model
seed_data_creation: Used existing inspection 78cd749c-5671-4611-a109-08f6ca7628ec and created new inspection 8aed0370-60c2-4696-9b9b-47836ac811da for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 requested features verified working. Key data-testids: home-button, nav-cancel-button, nav-confirm-button, input-horario-inicio, horario-termino-input, responsavel-input, crea-input, data-input, edit-inspection-button, edit-info-button, save-and-continue-button. Backend fix applied: InspectionUpdate model now includes horario_termino and crea_final fields. Checklist validation shows toast with 'Itens pendentes' listing missing fields.

feature_1_home_button_modal.details: Home button shows 'Página Inicial' text, opens modal with 'Cancelar' and 'Sim' buttons

feature_2_no_horario_termino_on_identifi.details: No horario_termino field on NewInspection.js or EditInspection.js pages

feature_3_finalization_fields.details: InspectionReview.js has: Responsável Técnico (editable), CREA (editable), Data (editable), Horário de Início (disabled/readonly), Horário de Término (editable)

feature_4_info_section_on_detail.details: InspectionDetail.js shows Informações section with all required fields: Cliente, Endereço, Unidade/Apartamento, Empreendimento, Construtora, Tipo do Imóvel, Energia Disponível, Documentos Recebidos

feature_5_edit_buttons.details: Both 'Editar Vistoria' and 'Editar Informações' buttons appear when inspection status is 'concluida'

feature_7_checklist_validation.details: Validation prevents navigation when Existência or Condição fields are not filled, shows toast with 'Itens pendentes' message listing missing items

bug_fixed.issue: InspectionUpdate Pydantic model was missing horario_termino and crea_final fields, preventing these values from being saved during finalization
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'horario_termino: Optional[str] = None' and 'crea_final: Optional[str] = None' to InspectionUpdate model
